AP12.notes: pick_best_calibrator benches Sigmoid/Isotonic/Beta/Spline on OOF probs, computes 95% percentile-bootstrap CI via evaluation.bootstrap.bootstrap_metric, applies Kull-2017 default (Isotonic n>=1000 / Beta otherwise) on CI-overlap. CalibrationConfig dataclass with policy_auto_pick=True default. Wired into post_calibrate_model: stamps metrics['calibration_policy'] = {chosen, ece_mean, ece_ci, alternatives, rule, n_oof, plot_path}. emit_plot=True renders reliability diagram via matplotlib. betacal installed for Beta backend; Spline silently skipped when ml_insights missing. 6 sensor tests pass: large-n disposition, small-n default-beta, emit_plot writes PNG, too-few-rows guard, row-mismatch guard, CalibrationConfig defaults.

AP13.notes: run_honest_diagnostics(ctx, models, metadata) produces 4 artefacts: (1) bootstrap_ci per top-line metric (roc_auc/brier/log_loss/ece) via evaluation.bootstrap.bootstrap_metric; (2) drift_psi categorical PSI summary across train/val/test via feature_drift_report.compute_categorical_drift_psi; (3) calibration reliability plot + auto-pick verdict per binary model via calibration.policy.pick_best_calibrator(emit_plot=True); (4) provenance disposition table via training.provenance.format_provenance_table. ReportingConfig.honest_estimator_diagnostics: bool = True default. Wired into _phase_finalize.finalize_suite immediately after _persist_ct_ensemble_entries so the persisted metadata blob carries the 4 artefacts. Defensive: every block records status=skipped+reason on failure rather than crashing finalize. 4 sensor tests pass.

whitelist_drain_format_provenance_table.notes: Removed training/provenance.py::format_provenance_table from _USER_DEFERRED_DEAD_HELPERS since honest_diagnostics is now its production consumer. _debt_baseline.json refreshed to lock in shrink (29 -> 28 entries in test_dead_helpers whitelist).
